_doc: Genesis Plaza profiling benchmark config (issue #1862). Read by gp_benchmark_runner.gd when --gp-benchmark (desktop) or gp-benchmark=true (deeplink) fires. Mobile runs override tag/warmup/sample/toggles via deeplink params (bench-tag, bench-warmup, bench-sample, bench-disable-tweens, bench-disable-transforms) so the matrix runs without re-exporting.
